zh.lifeSummary: 當Helwise de Murdac於大約1122年出生在英國越可爾拉辛比時，她的父親Ralph Murdac28歲，母親Beatrice de Cheyne33歲。她與Robert de Stuteville IV在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1183年在英國越可爾可廷加姆享年62歲。

zh-hans.Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England: 英国瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helwise de Murdac于大约1122年出生在英国越可爾拉辛比时，她的父亲Ralph Murdac28岁，母亲Beatrice de Cheyne33岁。她与Robert de Stuteville IV在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1183年在英国越可爾可廷加姆享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Murdac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Murdoch
meanings: Scottish: from an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal names Muireadhach ‘mariner’, Murchadh ‘sea-warrior’, and Muircheartach ‘sea-ruler’, the first element in each being muir ‘sea’. The personal name was introduced into Yorkshire and Normandy by Norsemen from Ireland as early as the 10th century. The surname in post-Conquest medieval England usually belongs to Norman families.

nameMeanings.name: Helwise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of   Éloise  , which enjoyed a revival of popularity in the 18th century after publication of  Rousseau's  philosophical novel La Nouvelle Héloïse (  1761 ).

variants.name: Éloise
meanings: variant of   Éloise  , which enjoyed a revival of popularity in the 18th century after publication of  Rousseau's  philosophical novel La Nouvelle Héloïse (  1761 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Helwise de Murdac was born about 1122, in Lazenby, Yorkshire, England, her father, Ralph Murdac, was 28 and her mother, Beatrice de Cheyne, was 33. She married Robert de Stuteville IV in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1183, in Cottingham, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helwise de Murdac est née environ 1122, à Lazenby, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Murdac, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Beatrice de Cheyne, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Stuteville IV à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1183, à Cottingham, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helwise de Murdac um 1122 in Lazenby, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Murdac 28 und ihre Mutter Beatrice de Cheyne 33. Sie hat in England, United Kingdom Robert de Stuteville IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1183 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Cottingham, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helwise de Murdac è nata il circa 1122 nel Lazenby, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Ralph Murdac, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Beatrice de Cheyne, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Stuteville IV nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1183, nel Cottingham, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Helwise de Murdacが約1122年にイギリスヨークシュアイアラズエンビーで生まれた時，父Ralph Murdacは28歳，母Beatrice de Cheyneは33歳であった。イギリスイギリスでRobert de Stuteville IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1183年にイギリスヨークシュアイアコッティンガムで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helwise de Murdac(이)가 대략 1122년 영국 요르크실르 라비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Murdac(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice de Cheyne(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드에서 Robert de Stuteville IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1183년 영국 요르크실르 컷잉함에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.East Riding, Yorkshire, England: Cleveland, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helwise de Murdac nasceu aproximadamente 1122, em Lazenby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Murdac, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice de Cheyne, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Stuteville IV em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1183, em Cottingham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helwise de Murdac родилась около 1122 г. в местности лазенби, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph Murdac было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Cheyne, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Stuteville IV в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1183 г. в местности коттингхам, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helwise de Murdac nació aproximadamente 1122, en Lazenby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Murdac, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Beatrice de Cheyne, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Robert de Stuteville IV en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1183, en Cottingham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años.
